raw.title: At What Risk Will We Resist?
raw.excerpt: With each day carrying the risk of further repression from the state, the pressure to defend our democratic rights is mounting.

llm_processed.summary: Discusses the courage required to challenge oppressive systems, framing resistance as a pathway to collective liberation and sustainability.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to building resilient movements that prioritize ecological and social regeneration.
